title: Ulyanovsk、Ulyanovsk Oblast — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Ulyanovsk、Ulyanovsk Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Ulyanovsk是Ulyanovsk Oblast的一个城市，人口约620,000。The birthplace of Vladimir Lenin, a Volga River city with a well-preserved historic center and a major aviation industry.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
